info.title: Tech Risk & Compliance - Compliance Automation
info.description: The Compliance Automation APIs are used to integrate external systems and streamline the flow of data with Compliance Automation in the OneTrust Platform.

hostname.description: The OneTrust hostname such as app.onetrust.com, app-eu.onetrust.com, app-de.onetrust.com, app-uk.onetrust.com, app-apac.onetrust.com, trial.onetrust.com, or uat.onetrust.com.

tags.name: Initiatives
tags.description: The Initiatives APIs are used to manage compliance initiatives for standards and frameworks.

post.description: Use this API to retrieve a list of all initiatives or search for initiatives based on the specified criteria.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The page number of the results.

schema.description: Results page to be retrieved (0..N). Example- '?page=1

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: The number of results per page.

schema.description: Number of records per page (1..50). Example- '?size=20

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: The sort criteria that dictates the order of the results.

errors.title: custom field is not supported in filter
errors.detail: custom field is not supported in filter

429.description:
Too Many Requests. 
For more information, see [API Rate Limits](https://developer.onetrust.com/onetrust/reference/rate-limits-overview).

schema.description: The number of seconds after which requests will be allowed again.
The unit of time for which the rate limit applies
The unique identifier for the rate-limiting event.
The number of requests made within the specified period.
The number of requests allowed within the specified period.

get.description: Use this API to retrieve details for a specific initiative. The response will include details such as the created date, workflow, and stage.

parameters.name: initiativeId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the initiative.

429.description:
Too Many Requests. 
For more information, see [API Rate Limits](https://developer.onetrust.com/onetrust/reference/rate-limits-overview).

schema.description: The number of seconds after which requests will be allowed again.
The unit of time for which the rate limit applies
The unique identifier for the rate-limiting event.
The number of requests made within the specified period.
The number of requests allowed within the specified period.

put.description: Use this API to update details of a specific initiative.

parameters.name: initiativeId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the initiative.

observationStartDT.description: The start date and time for which the initiative will be observed.

observationEndDT.description: The end date and time for which the initiative will be observed.

ownerIds.description: The list of unique identifiers of the users responsible for the initiative.

id.description: The unique identifier of the user who last modified the initiative.

name.description: The name of the user who last modified the initiative.

email.description: The email address of the user who last modified the initiative.

initials.description: The initials of the user who last modified the initiative.

createdDate.description: The date and time that the initiative was created.

lastUpdatedDate.description: The date and time that the initiative was last updated.

createdBy.description: The details of the user who created the initiative.

lastModifiedBy.description: The details of the user who last modified the initiative.

id.description: The unique identifier of the workflow.

workflowMode.description: The mode in which the workflow was created.

stageId.description: The unique identifier of the workflow stage.

stageName.description: The name of the workflow stage.

id.description: The unique identifier of the initiative.

number.description: The sequential order in which the initiative was created.

orgGroupId.description: The unique identifier of the organization accountable for managing the initiative.

complianceScore.description: The compliance score of the initiative.

scopeId.description: The unique identifier of the inventory record associated with the iniatiative.

scopeName.description: The name of the inventory record associated with the initiative.

scopeType.description: The type of inventory record associated with the initiative.

organizationName.description: The name of the organization accountable for managing the initiative.

legislations.description: The details of the standards or frameworks associated with the initiative.

observationStartDT.description: The start date and time for which the initiative will be observed.

observationEndDT.description: The end date and time for which the initiative will be observed.

owners.description: The details of the user responsible for the initiative.

creationStatus.description: The creation status of the initiative.

inventories.description: The details of the inventory records associated with the initiative.

workflowAndStage.description: The details of the workflow and stage.

auditFields.description: The activity details of when the initiative was created and last updated.

id.description: The unique identifier of the inventory record associated with the iniatiative.

name.description: The name of the inventory record associated with the initiative.

organization.description: The details of the organization responsible for the inventory record.

inventoryType.description: The type of inventory record associated with the initiative.

number.description: The sequential number of the inventory record associated with the initiative.

name.description: The name of the standard or framework.

frameworkId.description: The unique identifier of the standard or framework.

otFrameworkIdentifier.description: The OneTrust system identifier of the standard or framework.

guid.description: The unique identifier of the organization responsible for the inventory record.

name.description: The name of the organization responsible for the inventory record.

languageId.description: The ID of the default language for the organization responsible for the inventory record.

id.description: The unique identifier of the user responsible for the initiative.

active.description: This flag indicates whether the user responsible for the initiative is active.

name.description: The name of the user responsible for the initiative.

field.description: The field by which to filter results.

operator.description: The relationship that must be met between the field and the value.

value.description: The value by which to filter results.

toValue.description: The end value by which to filter results.

filters.description: The criteria used to filter results.

fullText.description: The search terms by which to filter results. A maximum of 500 characters is allowed.

criteria.description: The details of the filter criteria.

scopes.COMPLIANCE_AUTOMATION_READ: Access to read compliance automation components from external systems
scopes.COMPLIANCE_AUTOMATION_WRITE: Access to read and write compliance automation components from external systems
